sources.rent: rentals.ca / Urbanation National Rent Report May 2026 (Mississauga 1BR avg $2,152); Etobicoke/Toronto deltas from rentals.ca neighborhood pages
sources.income: StatsCan 2021 Census (city + dissemination area approximations); Mississauga city median $102,000
sources.crime: Peel Regional Police 2024 Annual Stats; Toronto Police Service Neighbourhood Crime Rates 2024 (overall Crime Severity Index proxy converted to per 100k order-of-magnitude)

_meta.notes: Crime rates are city-wide Peel (~3,400/100k total CCJS) or Toronto (~4,600/100k) baselines, modulated up/down by neighborhood-level CSI. All values flagged _estimated where not directly sourced from a primary stat at the neighborhood polygon level. Rents reflect May 2026 asking-rent medians.

Central Erin Mills.nearest_running_route: Sawmill Valley Trail + Culham Trail (5-10 min)
Central Erin Mills.vibe: Polished suburban professional, family-anchored around Erin Mills Town Centre and Credit Valley Hospital
Central Erin Mills.ideal_for: Operational excellence: short CVH commute, doorstep trails 9 mo/yr

Sawmill Valley / Sheridan.nearest_running_route: Sawmill Valley Trail (on doorstep) + UTM Nature Loop
Sawmill Valley / Sheridan.vibe: Quiet ravine-edge enclave, mature trees, runner's paradise
Sawmill Valley / Sheridan.ideal_for: Couple wanting trail-on-doorstep living, quiet streets, near UTM

Streetsville.nearest_running_route: Credit River Trail / Hewick Meadows (5 min)
Streetsville.vibe: Historic main-street village with GO access, Credit River cutting through
Streetsville.ideal_for: Couple wanting walkable village charm + GO commute optionality

Meadowvale.vibe: Family-friendly NW suburb with lakes, parks and townhomes
Meadowvale.ideal_for: ER doc wanting cheaper rent + lake-loop runs, cost-conscious couple

Churchill Meadows.nearest_running_route: Churchill Meadows Community Common + Osprey Marsh trail
Churchill Meadows.vibe: Newer planned suburb, wide arterials, young families, near CVH
Churchill Meadows.ideal_for: ER doc wanting <10 min CVH commute + new-build rentals

Cooksville.vibe: Dense, diverse, transit-rich older core with Hurontario LRT spine
Cooksville.ideal_for: Cost-conscious couple wanting transit + walkability over polish

Mississauga Valley.vibe: 1970s apartment-tower belt next to City Centre, walkable but tired
Mississauga Valley.ideal_for: Budget option close to Square One; couple OK with older stock

Square One / City Centre.nearest_running_route: Cooksville Creek Trail (~10 min) — limited urban routes otherwise
Square One / City Centre.vibe: Dense vertical downtown-in-progress, MiWay hub, all-condo skyline
Square One / City Centre.ideal_for: Couple wanting urban density, transit, gym/restaurant tower-life

Port Credit.nearest_running_route: Waterfront Trail + Credit River mouth (on doorstep)
Port Credit.vibe: Lakeside village with marina, GO 25 min to Union, breweries
Port Credit.ideal_for: Couple wanting walkability + waterfront runs + GO to TO

Lakeview Mississauga.nearest_running_route: Waterfront Trail (Marie Curtis Park to Lakefront Promenade)
Lakeview Mississauga.vibe: In-between waterfront sleeper, future Lakeview Village megaproject upside
Lakeview Mississauga.ideal_for: Couple wanting waterfront + cheaper than Port Credit, willing to wait for build-out

Clarkson / Lorne Park.nearest_running_route: Rattray Marsh Conservation + Jack Darling Park trails
Clarkson / Lorne Park.vibe: Affluent leafy lakeshore, big lots, GO 30 min, low-key
Clarkson / Lorne Park.ideal_for: Couple wanting nature + safety + GO commute, willing to drive for groceries

Applewood.nearest_running_route: Applewood Hills Greenbelt + Etobicoke Creek Trail
Applewood.vibe: 1960s ranch-house belt at the Toronto border, quiet, undervalued
Applewood.ideal_for: Cost-conscious couple wanting quick QEW/427 access, OK with older stock

Mimico.nearest_running_route: Waterfront Trail at Humber Bay (5-10 min)

nearest_running_club.name: Toronto Beaches Runners Club / various Etobicoke meetups

Mimico.vibe: Streetcar-Victorian village turning into mid-rise, GO 12 min to Union
Mimico.ideal_for: Couple wanting streetcar + GO + Toronto access without downtown rent

nearest_full_grocery.name: No Frills Long Branch / Metro New Toronto

Long Branch / New Toronto.nearest_running_route: Marie Curtis Park + Waterfront Trail (on doorstep)

nearest_running_club.name: Longbranch Run Club (informal) / Toronto run scene

Long Branch / New Toronto.vibe: Bohemian streetcar lakefront, indie cafes, GO terminus, growing
Long Branch / New Toronto.ideal_for: Couple wanting waterfront + indie vibe + dual TO/Mississauga access

nearest_full_grocery.name: Metro Marine Parade / Sobeys Park Lawn

Humber Bay Shores.nearest_running_route: Martin Goodman / Waterfront Trail (on doorstep, miles in either direction)

nearest_running_club.name: Humber Bay Run Crew / Parkdale Roadrunners

Humber Bay Shores.vibe: Glass-tower lakefront, skyline views, restaurant row, condo-only
Humber Bay Shores.ideal_for: Couple wanting premier urban-waterfront life, willing to pay top of band

nearest_full_grocery.name: No Frills Park Lawn / Metro Queensway

Stonegate.nearest_running_route: Mimico Creek Trail + Humber Bay (10 min)
Stonegate.vibe: Quiet bungalow pocket between Queensway and lake, gentrifying
Stonegate.ideal_for: Couple wanting quiet + central Etobicoke + walk to Humber Bay

nearest_full_grocery.name: Sobeys Bloor West / Metro Markland Plaza

Markland Wood.nearest_running_route: Etobicoke Creek Trail + Markland Wood Golf perimeter
Markland Wood.vibe: Affluent quiet golf-course suburb at Etobicoke/Mississauga seam
Markland Wood.ideal_for: Couple wanting safety + low density + golf-course adjacency, OK with car

nearest_full_grocery.name: No Frills The West Mall / FreshCo

Etobicoke West Mall.vibe: 1970s apartment-cluster between 427 and the West Mall, transit-served, modest
Etobicoke West Mall.ideal_for: Cost-conscious option with quick 427/QEW access; couple wanting cheap entry point
